abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is at full HP, any hit that would knock it out will instead leave it with 1 HP. Regardless of its current HP, it is also immune to the one-hit KO moves: Fissure, Guillotine, Horn Drill, and Sheer Cold. If this Pokémon is holding a Focus Sash, this ability takes precedence and the item will not be consumed.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: shell-armor
abilities.effect: Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon. This ability functions identically to Battle Armor.
abilities.flavorText: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: weak-armor
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
abilities.effect: Whenever a physical move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage and its Defense falls one stage. This ability triggers on every hit of a multiple-hit move.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.
